result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Create a ZIP archive from one or more files or directories.

Options:
  --archive-file-path <string>    Output path of the ZIP archive to create. [Required]
  --source-paths <string[]>       One or more files or directories to archive. [Required]
  -r, --recurse                   Include subdirectories recursively.
  -e, --encrypt                   Prompt for a password and create an encrypted ZIP archive.
  -D, --no-dir-entries            Do not create entries for directories.
